judge.reason: The function's primary purpose is to allocate and link required OPPs for an existing OPP. While it does involve refcount operations (get via _link_required_opps and put on error via _of_opp_free_required_opps), these are part of a larger initialization sequence that includes memory allocation and iteration. The function does not act as a get/put/set wrapper that returns a reference-counted object to the caller; instead, it configures internal state of the opp structure.
